text: Hi, I just received the quote for the kitchen tiling and renovation.
Hello Sarah! Thanks for reaching out. Our estimator sent that over this morning. What do you think?
Honestly, it's way higher than expected. It is almost 30% above the local market rate.
We completely understand your concerns. Our materials and labor warrant a higher standard, but we'd love to review the numbers with you.
I got your quote and honestly it's way above what I expected. Can I talk to someone senior?
I will escalate this immediately to the branch manager so they can call you directly.
Hey there, what are your opening hours on Saturdays?
Hi David! We are open on Saturdays from 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM for consultations. Weekdays we run 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM.
Great, do you have any open slots this Saturday around 11:00 AM?
Let me check our calendar... Yes! We have one opening at 11:00 AM. Would you like me to book it?
Yes, please. What documents do I need to bring?
Hello, I am interested in booking an onboarding call next week.
Hi Priya! We would love to set that up. Do you prefer morning or afternoon?
Mornings work best for me. Sometime Monday morning if possible?
Perfect. We have a slot on Monday at 9:30 AM. Does that work?
Yes, 9:30 AM works. Can you send the email confirmation?
Hi, I need a brochure on your commercial plumbing services.
Hello Marcus! I can help with that. Can you provide your company email?
Sure, it is marcus.vance@vanceplumbing.com.
Thank you! I will mail that over right away. Would you also like a call back?
Yes, have a rep call me back around 11:00 AM today.
I am writing to demand a full refund for yesterday's office cleaning.
Hello Amanda, I am very sorry to hear that you are unsatisfied. May I know what happened?
The workers completely missed cleaning the master bedroom and left dirt in the hallways.
That is definitely not our standard. I am escalating this to our billing supervisor to review your refund claim.
Please make sure this is handled today. I don't want to wait until next week.
Hi, what are your callout rates for a residential electrical check?
Hello Carlos! Our standard dispatch rate is $85, which includes the first 30 minutes of diagnostics.
Okay, that sounds fair. Do you have any electricians free this afternoon?
We have an opening between 2:00 PM and 4:00 PM today. Does that range work?
Yes, lock that slot in please. Name is Carlos.
